Link shortener on personal domain (Hytte-0v5) (#22)

* feat: add link shortener with click tracking (Hytte-0v5)

Adds a /go/{code} short URL redirect with click counting and a full
CRUD API behind authentication. Includes a React management page for
creating, editing, copying, and deleting short links.

Backend:
- short_links table with code uniqueness, cascade delete on user
- internal/links package: CRUD operations, redirect handler, tests
- API routes: GET/POST /api/links, PUT/DELETE /api/links/{id}
- Public redirect: GET /go/{code}

Frontend:
- Links page with create form, inline editing, copy-to-clipboard
- Added to sidebar and router (auth-protected)

Bead: Hytte-0v5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address review issues for link shortener (Hytte-0v5)

- Fix open redirect vulnerability: validate URL scheme (http/https) in
  RedirectHandler before issuing redirect
- Fix Update returning 500 instead of 404 for wrong user/missing link
  by checking RowsAffected
- Fix inconsistent timestamp format: read back DB row after Create
  instead of constructing with time.Now()
- Make IncrementClicks synchronous to avoid shutdown race
- Add loading guards for update/delete in Links.tsx to prevent
  double-click issues
- Surface fetch errors to user in Links.tsx
- Add httptest handler tests for all endpoints including redirect
  scheme validation
- Add auth.NewContext helper for injecting user in handler tests
- Add TestUpdateWrongUser data-layer test

Bead: Hytte-0v5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resolve CI failures for Hytte-0v5

* fix: address review comments for Hytte-0v5

- Use errors.As with sqlite.Error to detect unique constraint violations
  instead of brittle string matching
- Add isValidCode helper; validate code format/length (1-64 chars,
  [A-Za-z0-9_-]) in both Create and Update handlers
- Handle LastInsertId() and RowsAffected() errors instead of ignoring them
- Retry auto-generated code creation on unique constraint collision (up to 5x)
- Fix tests to use link.ID from Create() instead of hardcoded row IDs
- Assert errors from Create() calls in TestListByUser
- Guard JSON parsing in error paths with try/catch fallback (Links.tsx)
- Clear copyShortUrl setTimeout on unmount using useRef

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address review comments for Hytte-0v5

- handlers.go: distinguish sql.ErrNoRows (404) from other DB errors (500) in RedirectHandler
- links.go: check rows.Err() after iteration in ListByUser
- links_test.go: assert errors from Create/GetByCode/IncrementClicks in all tests
- Links.tsx: deduplicate load logic by calling fetchLinks() from useEffect
- Links.tsx: handle !res.ok and network errors in handleDelete
- Links.tsx: make copyShortUrl async with clipboard availability check and error handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix FastMCP context injection, add logging, lint checks, and session_id forwarding

- Fix FastMCP 3.x incompatibility: replace mcp.get_context() with ctx: Context parameter injection
- Add structured logging to all MCP tools so agent calls appear in Docker logs
- Run ruff + mypy inside Docker on changed_files during run_review; surface results to reviewer agent
- Fix get_test_spec validation: architect action_required now explicitly passes plan as dict and session_id
- Add lint_results field to ReviewerInput; reviewer prompt and checklist updated accordingly
- Add unit tests covering lint_results rendering and session_id forwarding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fast-forward opponent turns in TUI game loop (#64)

* Auto-pass priority for all opponent turns in TUI goldfish mode

During goldfish (solitaire) play, there are no meaningful actions on the
opponent's turn. Previously the TUI would still stop and prompt the human
player for priority during opponent turns if instant-speed actions were
available. Now the entire opponent turn is elided by auto-passing for
both players whenever active_player != 0.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01HfyqL2Jr4mHVEugrp9T1YV

* Simplify: use fast_forward_goldfish_turn() instead of manual loop

Replace the hand-rolled opponent-turn auto-pass logic with the existing
fast_forward_goldfish_turn() utility, which is already used in 3 other
call sites. This avoids expensive legal_actions() calls during opponent
turns and handles more edge cases (triggers, tutors, cleanup discard).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01HfyqL2Jr4mHVEugrp9T1YV

Remove frizbee.yml caller workflow (#1582)

* Add zizmor and frizbee CI checks

Add caller workflows for zizmor (security scanning) and frizbee
(action pinning verification). Fix zizmor findings where applicable
and add suppression config for intentional patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add explicit permissions blocks, remove excessive-permissions ignores

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Replace zizmor line-number ignores with policies

Use unpinned-uses config.policies with org-level wildcard and
secrets-inherit disable instead of brittle per-line ignores that
break whenever workflow files change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Disable ref-confusion audit

The ref-confusion audit crashes when workflows reference private
repos (e.g. internal-workflows, robot) because the GITHUB_TOKEN
lacks cross-repo access. Disable until zizmor supports scoping
this audit or we provide a broader token.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add security-events: write to zizmor caller workflow

The caller workflow's permissions are the ceiling for reusable
workflows. The zizmor-action needs security-events: write to
upload SARIF results to GitHub Advanced Security.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove frizbee.yml caller workflow

Frizbee is being removed from the reusable actionci workflow
(smallstep/workflows#301). This standalone caller is no longer needed.

commit.message:
Remove HWMON and THERMAL from kernel disables (selected by ACPI)

ACPI_THERMAL selects THERMAL, which selects HWMON. Since ACPI is required
in the VM, these can't be disabled — make config rejects the answer and
generate-config.pl dies with "repeated question".

commit.message:
Elevate forge_physics.h as primary deliverable in physics skill (#231)

* Elevate forge_physics.h as the primary deliverable in dev-physics-lesson skill

The skill previously treated the physics library as a sidebar — step 3 said
"when applicable" and step 12 repeated that hedge. The library is the crown
jewel of the physics track: the lessons teach, the library is what remains.

Step 3 is now a comprehensive library engineering standard covering
correctness, numerical safety, performance, validation, documentation, and
mandatory testing with 5 test categories (correctness, edge cases,
conservation, determinism, collision-specific). The redundant step 12 is
removed. Opening text and smart behavior establish library-first ordering.

Also updates lessons/physics/README.md and common/physics/README.md to
reflect the elevated role.

Files changed:
- .claude/skills/dev-physics-lesson/SKILL.md — rewrite step 3, remove step 12, update intro
- common/physics/README.md — add library standards to description and design section
- lessons/physics/README.md — update Library-driven bullet

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address PR feedback: fix gravity comment sign, add collision test category

Themes addressed:
- Sign mismatch in test example: comment said "v = 9.81 m/s" but
  assertion checks -9.81f — fixed to "v = -9.81 m/s"
- Missing collision test category: added "collision-specific behavior"
  to the required test categories in physics README

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address PR feedback: annotate particle_create params, replace memcmp

Themes addressed:
- Ambiguous forge_physics_particle_create() parameters: added inline
  comments (/* position */, /* mass */, /* damping */, /* restitution */)
  to both example snippets (lines 250 and 262)
- Unsafe memcmp for struct equality: replaced with explicit member-wise
  comparisons (vec3_equal for position/velocity, direct == for inv_mass)

~ inside a variable is not expanded by the shell, causing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix simultaneous pass/fail messages on same field

Multiple validators run per field (e.g. RequiredFieldValidator → Passed,
ErpVendorNameValidator → Failed). Both results were being rendered, showing
green ✓ and red ✗ badges at the same time on the same field.

Fix: filter displayed messages to only those matching the field's overall
validation status (Failed > Warning > Passed priority). If the field is
Failed, only Failed messages show; if Passed, only Passed messages show.

Applied to both DocumentDetailPage header fields and FieldReviewPanel
header fields.

commit.message:
feat: add --fail-on option to control exit code by severity

Allows CI pipelines to ignore warnings and only fail on errors.
`--fail-on=error` makes warnings return exit code 0 instead of 1.
Available via CLI (--fail-on=error) and config (fail_on: error).
Invalid values throw InvalidArgumentException.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add BM25 full-text search via pg_search with query parsing (Step 2.1)

BM25SearchAdapter uses ParadeDB pg_search operators: ||| (disjunction),
&&& (conjunction), ### (phrase). SearchService.bm25_search provides
application-layer orchestration with query parsing for quoted phrases,
boolean AND, and mixed queries. Alembic migration creates BM25 indexes
on chunks.chunk_text and documents.title+rendered_markdown with English
stemmer. Snippet highlighting handles phrases as whole units. 22 tests
cover parsing, search orchestration, highlighting, and term extraction.

- 밍글스 3스타 승격은 2025년 사건으로 올바르게 서술
- 모수는 2025년 1스타 획득 후 2026 가이드에서 2스타 기대 후보로 소개
- 2025 신규 1스타 레스토랑 7곳 (기가스, 레귬, 소수헌, 에스콘디도,
  유 유안, 이스트, 뛰뚜아멍) 실제 명단으로 교체
- Bump news.js v41 → v42

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 多 FE 容错 + SSH sshpass 认证 + grep AND 逻辑 + 日志容错

1. 多 FE 容错: 支持 sr_hosts 多地址列表，按优先级轮转尝试，
   连接成功后 SHOW FRONTENDS 发现 LEADER 并自动切换首选节点
2. SSH sshpass 支持: executeSshCommands 支持密码认证，
   从 cluster config / 环境变量 / args 三级获取密码
3. grep AND 逻辑: 多关键词从 OR (grep -E "a|b") 改为
   AND (grep "a" | grep "b")，精确过滤日志
4. fetch_log_content 容错: 非零退出码但有有效 stdout 时
   视为成功（grep 管道部分匹配可能返回非零）
5. handleFetchLogsLocally: 透传 ssh_password 参数

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use lib.mkForce for kernel options that conflict with NixOS common-config.nix

14 options (DRM, I2C, SPI, HWMON, MD, FUSION, ACCESSIBILITY, etc.) are set
to yes/module in NixOS's common-config.nix. Our structuredExtraConfig needs
lib.mkForce to override them to =n for the microVM guest kernel.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
